controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.text: Information security roles and responsibilities shall be defined and allocated according to the information security policy topic-specific policies.
controls.evidence_expectation: RACI chart or role matrix; CISO/DPO appointment letter; job descriptions with security responsibilities
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify security roles defined; check responsibilities documented and communicated

controls.title: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
controls.text: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements relevant to information security and the organisation's approach to meet these requirements shall be identified, documented and kept up to date.
controls.evidence_expectation: Legal register; contractual obligations log; compliance calendar
controls.assessment_procedure: Review legal register currency; verify contractual requirements tracked; check GDPR/DPDP obligations listed

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.text: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.
controls.evidence_expectation: Privileged access register; PAM solution evidence; periodic privileged access review
controls.assessment_procedure: Count privileged accounts; verify MFA enforced for privileged access; check quarterly reviews conducted

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.text: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.
controls.evidence_expectation: DLP tool evidence; DLP policy; alert log samples; incident records
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify DLP covers email, endpoint, cloud; check policy tuned for sensitive data categories; review alerts acted upon

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.text: Networks, systems and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour and appropriate actions taken to evaluate potential information security incidents.
controls.evidence_expectation: SIEM configuration; monitoring coverage matrix; alert response procedures; sample alert tickets
controls.assessment_procedure: Review SIEM coverage; verify alerting for key threat scenarios; check mean-time-to-detect metrics
